title: Chicken Pozole
description: A Mexican-inspired posole recipe with tender chicken, flavorful broth, and crunchy toppings.
instructions: 1. Shred the chicken breast into bite-sized pieces.
2. In a large pot, heat 2 tbsp of oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Add the diced green chilies and cook for 1 minute.
5. Add the shredded chicken, pozole, and mexican oregano.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
7. Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
8. Serve the pozole hot, topped with a drizzle of dulce de leche and crushed tortilla chips.
